name: Blockchain Coinvestors Acquisition Corp. I Unit
summary: Blockchain Coinvestors Acquisition Corp. I Unit consists of one Class A ordinary share and one-half of one redeemable warrant. Blockchain Coinvestors Acquisition Corp. I is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is sponsored by Blockchain Coinvestors.
